goals.description: Submit the reading response draft to prof_assignment before 23:00.
goals.rationale: The cohort is counting on me. If I drop this now, everyone in group_3 gets penalized and my reputation as a reliable teammate crumbles instantly. My impulsive brain is already panicking about being seen as unreliable, so I have to crush this task right now rather than worrying about sleep debt or long-term planning. If I don't do this, the whole group takes the fall.

goals.description: Clean up the room immediately to stop the garbage smell before bed.
goals.rationale: I can't wake up tomorrow feeling like a total loser while everyone else is studying in a clean space. It's too humiliating to go to sleep with that stench hanging over us. But I'm not risking it on top of the submission deadline. If I start now, I might burn out mid-task and miss the team deadline anyway. Better to finish the big one first, then deal with the rest when I have energy left over.

goals.description: Drag roommate_R to the library right now; tell them bluntly that their unwashed clothes are ruining my sleep and focus, and I'm moving there with them immediately.
goals.rationale: I can't sit here any longer. My brain is fried from the smell, and if I don't confront this directly, they'll think I'm letting the group down by ignoring it. Plus, the library is the only way to actually finish my work without getting distracted.

I won't let them think I'm letting the group down by ignoring it, but since I'm impulsive and tired, I'll keep the confrontation short and move on quickly rather than dragging out a conflict.
